Many people fail to grasp the full extent of the damage caused by Nicolás Maduro’s leadership in Venezuela. His regime has been marked by widespread repression, including the killing of civilians who protested peacefully in Caracas and other cities. Economic policies under his rule pushed countless families into extreme poverty, forcing them to survive on wages that were insufficient to meet even basic needs. The accountability now faced by Maduro and those close to him is a necessary step toward justice for the Venezuelan people.
